description: Toy anxiety module used for the public showcase.

anchors: Was there an extended period where worry felt hard to turn off?

followups.duration_weeks: About how long did that run for?

anchors: Did you have any sharp spikes of fear or activation that peaked quickly?

followups.symptom_count: How many body or thought symptoms were happening at once?
